response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience, open-source leadership via GISCollective, and strong Linux/architecture exposure aligned with the role's technical core. However, the position requires C1 German (candidate lists only Basic), and the resume shows limited evidence of formal team leadership, mentoring, or client-facing consulting at an executive level. Worth a screening call to verify language progression and leadership scope.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background with Linux, open-source, and architecture experience (GISCollective founder)
Track record across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices including high-throughput systems at Sociomantic
Active community contributor: workshops, talks, TDD/craftsmanship advocacy — fits mentoring aspect
concerns: German listed as Basic — role requires minimum C1, a likely hard blocker
Limited explicit team-lead/management experience; no clear Head-of-Development or formal people-leadership role
No mention of UML proficiency or Python, both called out in the JD

key_factors.factor: Strong open-source, Linux, and architecture breadth
